serviceHealth.command: echo "Postgres already running externally" && pg_isready -h localhost -p 5432
serviceHealth.observation: The externally managed Postgres dependency remained available; the setup command echoed the expected note and `pg_isready` returned `localhost:5432 - accepting connections`.

commands.observation: `turbo run build` completed successfully across the monorepo on the rerun. Prisma generate ran, the docs/remix/openpage-api builds succeeded, and Turbo reported 5 successful tasks with no build errors.
`turbo run lint` exited 0 with warnings only: 17 in `@documenso/ui`, 7 in `@documenso/trpc`, and 37 in `@documenso/lib`; no lint errors blocked the rerun.
